kinesisanalytics.application.recordcolum.Description: Reference to the data element in the streaming input or the reference data source. This element is required if the [RecordFormatType](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/dev/API_RecordFormat.html#analytics-Type-RecordFormat-RecordFormatTypel) is `JSON`.
Name of the column created in the in-application input stream or reference table.
Type of column created in the in-application input stream or reference table.
